positive: Minimalist abstract mountain range silhouette against a vibrant cosmic gradient background of deep indigo, magenta, and electric cyan. The mountains should be geometrically simplified, creating strong, clean lines, reminiscent of mid-century modern travel posters. The composition is centered, with the peaks dominating the upper two-thirds. Use negative space effectively. Studio lighting, hyper-detailed, vector art quality, high contrast, clean aesthetic, isolated subject, perfect for apparel print.
